title: Trump drops $10 billion lawsuit against IRS
summary: Trump withdrew a $10 billion lawsuit against the IRS, signaling a strategic decision or possible settlement on federal tax disputes. This development could influence ongoing discussions about executive-level tax policy.

zh.title: 特朗普撤回针对国税局的100亿美元诉讼
zh.summary: 特朗普撤回了针对国税局的100亿美元诉讼，表明了战略性决定或可能的联邦税务纠纷和解。这一发展可能会影响关于行政级税收政策的持续讨论。

title: ‘I experienced many years of poverty’: I worked until 70. Why do wealthy retirees look down on those with less savings?
summary: An article explores wealth inequality in retirement through the experience of someone who worked until age 70, highlighting how wealthy retirees dismiss those with limited savings. The piece underscores that the majority of people struggle financially in retirement.
content: “The majority of people are struggling to make ends meet.”

zh.title: "我经历过多年的贫困"：我工作到70岁。为什么富有的退休人士看不起那些储蓄较少的人？
zh.summary: 一篇文章通过一位工作到70岁的人的经历探讨了退休财富不平等问题，强调了富有的退休人士如何贬低储蓄有限的人。这篇文章强调了大多数人在退休时在财务上都很困难。

title: Bank of England does not need to hike interest rates, says IMF — it may even need to cut
summary: The IMF contradicts market expectations by stating the Bank of England does not need to raise interest rates and may need to cut them instead. This guidance carries significant weight in UK monetary policy decisions despite inflation concerns from the Iran war.
content: The Bank of England is expected to hold and even potentially hike interest rates this year in response to resurgent inflation sparked by the Iran war.

zh.title: 国际货币基金组织表示英格兰银行无需提高利率——甚至可能需要降低
zh.summary: 国际货币基金组织与市场预期相矛盾，声称英格兰银行无需提高利率，反而可能需要降低利率。尽管伊朗战争引发的通胀担忧，这一指导在英国货币政策决策中具有重要分量。

title: UK growth forecast upgraded by IMF but risks remain
summary: The IMF upgraded the UK's 2026 growth forecast from 0.8% to 1%, reflecting an improved economic outlook. The upgrade comes with caveats about remaining risks to sustained recovery.
content: Growth has been upgraded from 0.8% to 1% for 2026 in the influential body's latest forecast.

zh.title: 英国增长预测被国际货币基金组织上调，但风险仍存
zh.summary: 国际货币基金组织将英国2026年增长预测从0.8%上调至1%，反映出经济前景改善。该上调伴随着对持续复苏风险的警告。

title: NextEra Energy to buy Dominion in deal that unites two key players in race to power AI data centers
summary: NextEra Energy is acquiring Dominion Energy in a major deal uniting the largest U.S. renewable energy developer with the company that powers the world's largest data center market in Northern Virginia. The merger positions the combined entity to capture massive energy demand from AI infrastructure buildout.
content: Dominion powers the world's largest data center market in Northern Virginia. NextEra is the biggest renewable energy developer in the U.S.

zh.title: NextEra能源收购Dominion，联合两大企业竞逐为AI数据中心供能
zh.summary: NextEra能源正在收购Dominion能源，这笔重大交易将美国最大的可再生能源开发商与为北弗吉尼亚州全球最大数据中心市场供能的公司联合起来。该合并使联合实体能够捕捉AI基础设施建设带来的巨大能源需求。

title: JPMorgan's summer reading list for the wealthy includes books on AI, leadership and lemons
summary: JPMorgan released its annual summer reading list featuring 14 curated books focused on AI, leadership, and other topics for its wealthy clients. The list has become an influential cultural touchstone among high-net-worth individuals.
content: JPMorgan’s annual summer reading list, which has become the go-to selection of beach books for the wealthy, has 14 titles this year.

zh.title: 摩根大通富人夏季阅读清单包括AI、领导力和柠檬相关书籍
zh.summary: 摩根大通发布了年度夏季阅读清单，精选14本书籍，重点关注AI、领导力等主题，供其富有客户阅读。该清单已成为高净值人士中有影响力的文化标志。

title: This chart shows why AI will eventually mean lower bond yields
summary: An analyst argues that widespread workplace adoption of AI will weaken labor markets and eventually drive down bond yields and interest rates. This dynamic would significantly shift the risk-return profile for fixed-income investors.
content: Potential labor-market weakness following the widespread adoption of AI practices in the workplace should eventually lead to lower interest rates, Dario Perkins contends.

zh.title: 这张图表显示了为什么人工智能最终会导致债券收益率下降
zh.summary: 一位分析师辩称，人工智能在工作场所的广泛应用将削弱劳动力市场，最终推低债券收益率和利率。这一动态将显著改变固定收益投资者的风险-收益比。

title: We're trimming an AI rocket ship of a stock and one that's now back in favor
summary: An investment fund is selling positions in two stocks—a high-growth AI-focused company and another that has recently regained investor favor. The moves reflect shifting portfolio strategy and changed outlooks on these holdings.
content: We're making two sales.

zh.title: 我们正在减持一只强势AI股票和一只最近重回投资者青睐的股票
zh.summary: 一家投资基金正在减持两只股票的头寸——一只是高增长的人工智能焦点公司，另一只是最近重新获得投资者青睐的公司。这些举措反映了投资组合策略的调整和对这些持股看法的改变。

title: I inherited a house. My CPA says I should sell within a year to avoid capital gains. Is he right?
summary: A homeowner seeks tax advice on whether selling an inherited house within one year avoids capital gains taxes and plans to sell to a family member at appraised value. The article addresses stepped-up basis rules and capital gains tax timing strategies.
content: “We plan to sell it to another family member for the appraised value.”

zh.title: 我继承了一套房子。我的注册会计师说我应该在一年内出售以避免资本利得税。他说得对吗？
zh.summary: 一位房主寻求税务建议，了解在一年内出售继承的房屋是否可以避免资本利得税，并计划按评估价值将房产出售给家庭成员。文章讨论了递增基础规则和资本利得税时间策略。

title: Ford boss hints at return of Fiesta as an electric model
summary: Ford leadership hinted at reviving the Fiesta nameplate as an electric vehicle, part of plans to build seven new EV models in Europe. The announcement reflects Ford's strategic pivot toward electric vehicle production in key markets.
content: The company has announced plans to build seven new models in Europe including a small electric hatchback.

zh.title: 福特老板暗示菲斯塔将回归电动车型
zh.summary: 福特领导层暗示将复兴菲斯塔品牌名称作为电动车，这是在欧洲建造七款新电动汽车的计划的一部分。此项公告反映了福特在关键市场向电动车生产的战略转向。

title: Berkshire has revamped its portfolio — here's how the new stocks are trading
summary: Berkshire Hathaway significantly restructured its portfolio with a $2.6 billion stake in Delta Airlines and a 224% increase in Alphabet shares. These moves reflect Warren Buffett's current investment thesis on valuations in the airline and tech sectors.
content: Berkshire Hathaway took a $2.6 billion stake in Delta Airlines and increased its shares in Alphabet by 224%.

zh.title: 伯克希尔重组了其投资组合——以下是新股票的交易情况
zh.summary: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司大幅重组了投资组合，对达美航空投入26亿美元股份，并将字母表股份增加了224%。这些举措反映了沃伦·巴菲特对航空和科技行业估值的当前投资论点。

title: Three ways the AI boom may fizzle — and what happens to stocks next
summary: Market strategists identify three scenarios where AI investment momentum could falter, including potential pullbacks in big tech capital expenditures. These downside scenarios highlight risks to the AI bull case that could destabilize equity markets.
content: A pullback in big tech capex may rattle markets, say Panmure Liberum strategists.

zh.title: 人工智能热潮可能熄火的三种方式——以及接下来股票会发生什么
zh.summary: 市场战略家指出了AI投资势头可能减弱的三种情景，包括大科技公司资本支出可能出现回撤。这些下行情景突出了对AI看涨情况的风险，可能会破坏股票市场的稳定性。

title: Trump says he should've asked for 'more' of Intel when negotiating stake with CEO
summary: Trump suggested he should have negotiated a larger government stake in Intel beyond the 9.9% acquired in an August deal. The comment highlights the stake's appreciation as Intel's stock has surged.
content: The chipmaker's stock has soared since the U.S. equity deal in August gave the government 9.9% of the company.

zh.title: 特朗普称在与首席执行官谈判英特尔股份时应该要求"更多"
zh.summary: 特朗普表示，他本应该争取比8月交易中获得的9.9%更大的政府股份。这一评论突显了随着英特尔股价上涨，该股份的升值。

title: Here are Monday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Netflix, Amazon, TJX Companies, Arm, Viking, Circle & more
summary: A market roundup of the biggest analyst calls from Monday covering Nvidia, Netflix, Amazon, and other major companies, with notable rating changes and price targets. These calls track shifting Wall Street sentiment on key market movers.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Monday.

zh.title: 周一最大的分析师评级：英伟达、Netflix、亚马逊、TJX公司、Arm、Viking、Circle等
zh.summary: 周一最大分析师评级的市场总结，涵盖英伟达、Netflix、亚马逊和其他主要公司，包括显著的评级变化和目标价格。这些评级追踪华尔街对主要市场驱动力的观点变化。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Regeneron, Dominion Energy, Macy's & more
summary: A premarket snapshot of stocks posting the largest early morning moves, including Regeneron, Dominion Energy, and Macy's. Premarket volatility often signals opening session direction and reflects overnight sentiment shifts.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 盘前涨跌幅最大的股票：再生元、Dominion能源、梅西百货等
zh.summary: 盘前交易中涨跌幅最大的股票快照，包括再生元、Dominion能源和梅西百货。盘前波动通常预示开盘时段方向，反映隔夜情绪变化。

title: Ryanair has plans for 'armageddon' scenario as CFO warns weaker European carriers may not survive jet fuel crunch
summary: Ryanair is preparing contingency plans amid a global jet fuel crisis that could threaten smaller European airlines' survival. The crisis presents a significant operational and financial challenge for the aviation industry.
content: Ryanair said it has plans for an "armageddon situation," amid the jet fuel crisis.

zh.title: Ryanair为"末日"情景制定计划，CFO警告较弱的欧洲航空公司可能无法度过燃油危机
zh.summary: Ryanair正在为全球喷气燃料危机制定应急计划，这场危机可能威胁较小欧洲航空公司的生存。这场危机对航空业构成了重大的运营和财务挑战。

title: Oil prices rise after Trump warns Iran over stalled peace talks
summary: Oil prices increased following Trump's warnings to Iran regarding stalled peace negotiations. The closure of the Strait of Hormuz continues to create volatility in energy markets.
content: Energy markets have been on a wild ride as the key Strait of Hormuz waterway remains effectively closed.

zh.title: 特朗普对伊朗警告后油价上涨，涉及停滞的和平谈判
zh.summary: 在特朗普对伊朗关于停滞的和平谈判发出警告后，油价上涨。霍尔木兹海峡的封闭继续在能源市场中造成波动。

title: European markets open the week lower after Trump threatens Iran
summary: European stock markets opened lower as investors react to escalating U.S.-Iran tensions stemming from Trump's threats toward Iran. The geopolitical tensions are dampening investor sentiment across the continent.
content: European stocks opened the new trading week in negative territory as investors react to the latest developments in the U.S.-Iran war.

zh.title: 特朗普威胁伊朗后欧洲市场本周低开
zh.summary: 由于投资者对特朗普威胁伊朗引发的美伊关系升级做出反应，欧洲股市低开。地缘政治紧张局势正在削弱整个欧洲大陆的投资者情绪。

title: Treasury yields rise amid global bond rout as inflation fears grip investors
summary: Global bond yields rose as resurgent inflation concerns drive a broad sell-off in debt markets worldwide. Investors are repositioning portfolios in response to mounting inflation anxiety.
content: Global bond yields rose on Monday as fears of resurgent inflation grip financial markets.

zh.title: 通胀恐惧笼罩投资者 全球债券崩跌中美债收益率上升
zh.summary: 随着通胀担忧再度浮现，全球债券市场遭遇广泛抛售，债券收益率上升。投资者正在应对日益增长的通胀焦虑，重新调整投资组合。

title: Samsung strike involving 47,000 workers looms as South Korea’s president urges labor deal
summary: South Korea's government is pushing Samsung Electronics and its union to reach an agreement and avert a major strike involving 47,000 workers. Officials warn the strike could cost billions to the economy.
content: South Korea’s government stepped up pressure on Samsung Electronics and its union to avert a strike that officials say could cost the economy billions.

zh.title: 韩国总统敦促劳资协议 三星47000名员工罢工在即
zh.summary: 韩国政府正在推动三星电子与其工会达成协议，以避免涉及47000名员工的重大罢工。官员警告称，罢工可能导致经济损失数十亿美元。

title: Instant AI answers can trivialise human intelligence, warns Royal Observatory
summary: The Royal Observatory warns that reliance on instant AI-generated answers could undervalue human expertise and knowledge. The institution emphasizes the importance of preserving human intelligence and avoiding over-dependence on AI.
content: Paddy Rodgers said the Observatory's rich history showed the power of human knowledge and the need to avoid "dependence" on AI.

zh.title: 皇家天文台警告：即时人工智能答案可能贬低人类智能
zh.summary: 皇家天文台警告，依赖即时生成的人工智能答案可能低估人类专业知识和智慧。该机构强调保护人类智能和避免过度依赖人工智能的重要性。

title: Rise in solar panel sales as people 'want to save money'
summary: Solar panel sales are increasing as consumers seek to reduce energy costs and protect against future price increases. Companies are capitalizing on growing demand for renewable energy solutions.
content: One director, who has just bought 2,000 panels, hopes to safeguard the company's future bills.

zh.title: 随着人们"想省钱"，太阳能电池板销售增加
zh.summary: 随着消费者寻求降低能源成本并防止未来价格上涨，太阳能电池板销售正在增加。公司正在利用对可再生能源解决方案日益增长的需求。

title: China's economy loses steam in April as retail sales hit 40-month low
summary: China's economic growth slowed significantly in April with retail sales falling to a 40-month low, alongside weaker industrial output and investment. The figures signal dampening consumer demand and economic momentum.
content: China's economy stumbled in April with consumption, industrial output and investment growth missing expectations.

zh.title: 中国经济在4月失去动力，零售销售创40个月新低
zh.summary: 中国4月经济增长显著放缓，零售销售跌至40个月低点，同时工业产出和投资走弱。这些数字表明消费者需求和经济动力在减弱。

title: High energy prices could derail Europe’s AI race with U.S. and China
summary: Varying energy costs across Europe could disadvantage some regions in attracting AI investments compared to the U.S. and China. Energy price disparities may create winners and losers in the global AI competition.
content: Energy costs vary widely across Europe, creating clear winners and losers in attracting investment.

zh.title: 高能源价格可能阻碍欧洲与美国和中国的AI竞争
zh.summary: 欧洲各地的不同能源成本可能使某些地区在吸引AI投资方面相比美国和中国处于劣势。能源价格差异可能在全球AI竞争中产生赢家和输家。

title: Novo Nordisk’s next obesity battlefront: Winning beyond America
summary: Following a successful U.S. launch of its weight loss pill, Novo Nordisk is focusing on expanding its obesity treatment business into international markets. The company aims to replicate its domestic success globally.
content: The weight loss pill had a strong U.S. launch this year, and Novo believes that will be replicated in other markets around the world.

zh.title: 诺和诺德的下一个肥胖症战场：在美国之外获胜
zh.summary: 诺和诺德在美国成功推出减肥药后，正在关注将其肥胖治疗业务扩展到国际市场。该公司旨在全球范围内复制其国内成功。

title: Why a small UK lender has major U.S. credit firms on edge
summary: The collapse of MFS, a small UK lender, has raised concerns among major U.S. credit firms about systemic risks in complex credit markets. The fallout highlights potential broader vulnerabilities in the financial system.
content: The continuing fallout from MFS' collapse has heightened fears that problems in complex credit markets pose a broader systemic risk.

zh.title: 为什么一家小型英国贷款机构让美国主要信用公司感到不安
zh.summary: 小型英国贷款机构MFS的倒闭引起了美国主要信用公司对复杂信贷市场系统性风险的担忧。此次崩溃突出了金融系统中潜在的更广泛脆弱性。

title: White House touts deals on soybeans and rare earths after Trump-Xi summit, while China talks up tariff cuts
summary: The Trump-Xi summit produced agreements on soybeans and rare earth trade, though the U.S. and China have offered differing descriptions of the outcomes. The developments represent progress in U.S.-China trade negotiations.
content: The meeting between U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping last week yielded new pacts, though the sides have provided differing details.

zh.title: 白宫在特朗普-习会晤后宣传大豆和稀土交易，中国则谈论关税削减
zh.summary: 特朗普-习会晤产生了关于大豆和稀土贸易的协议，尽管美国和中国对结果进行了不同的描述。这些发展代表了美中贸易谈判的进展。

title: Mizuho shares slide 7% after denying decision on reported Rakuten Bank investment shift
summary: Mizuho Financial Group's stock fell 7% after the company denied making a decision on a reported shift in its Rakuten Bank investment. The uncertainty around the investment strategy is weighing on investor confidence.
content: Shares of Mizuho Financial Group fell over 7% Monday, after the company said it has not made decision yet on investment in Rakuten Bank.

zh.title: 瑞穗金融否认关于乐天银行投资转变的决定，股价下跌7%
zh.summary: 瑞穗金融集团股价在公司否认就报道的乐天银行投资转变做出决定后下跌7%。围绕投资战略的不确定性正在打击投资者信心。

title: South Korea market volatility nears record high after $13 billion foreign investor selloff
summary: South Korea's stock market volatility surged near record levels following a $13.2 billion selloff by foreign investors last week. The sharp outflow reflects investor concerns about the Korean market.
content: South Korea's stock market volatility surged near record highs on Monday after foreign investors dumped $13.2 billion worth of local equities last week.

zh.title: 韩国股市在132亿美元外资抛售后波动性接近历史高位
zh.summary: 韩国股市在上周外资132亿美元抛售后，波动性激增至接近创纪录水平。这种急剧的资本外流反映了投资者对韩国市场的担忧。

title: Oil rises as Iran-U.S. deadlocked peace talks fan fears of extended supply disruption
summary: Trump's weekend warning to Iran signals potential escalation of the Washington-Tehran impasse over ending the war. The threat of resumed armed conflict is fueling fears of extended crude supply disruption, which is pushing oil prices higher.
content: Trump's warning to Iran over the weekend signals that the impasse between Washington and Tehran over ending the war could deteriorate into resumption of armed conflict.

zh.title: 随着伊朗-美国和平谈判陷入僵局引发供应中断担忧，油价上升
zh.summary: 特朗普周末对伊朗的警告预示华盛顿-德黑兰在结束战争问题上的对峙可能升级。重启武装冲突的威胁引发了人们对长期原油供应中断的担忧，推高了油价。

title: Dow futures slip, oil prices push higher as Iran war remains stuck in stalemate
summary: U.S. stock futures fell while crude prices surged on Sunday, extending the previous week's volatility. The market's recent rally stalled as the Iran war remains deadlocked, with oil supply concerns driving the divergent trading patterns.
content: U.S. stock-index futures fell and crude prices rose on Sunday, after the market’s rally stalled last week as oil prices rose sharply amid the impasse in the war with Iran.

zh.title: 随着伊朗战争陷入僵局，道琼斯期货下跌，油价上升
zh.summary: 美国股指期货周日下跌，而原油价格飙升，延续了前一周的波动性。随着伊朗战争陷入僵局，市场近期涨势停滞，油价供应担忧推动了交易模式分化。

title: Asia-Pacific markets fall as Trump’s Iran warning stokes fresh oil supply fears
summary: Asia-Pacific markets declined following Trump's direct warning to Iran to "get moving, FAST." Renewed geopolitical tensions over the unresolved conflict are intensifying concerns about oil supply stability in the region.
content: Asia-Pacific markets fell as investors weighed renewed geopolitical tensions after Donald Trump warned Iran to "get moving, FAST."

zh.title: 亚太市场下跌，特朗普对伊朗的警告引发新的油价供应担忧
zh.summary: 亚太市场在特朗普直接警告伊朗"快速行动"后下跌。未解决冲突引发的地缘政治紧张局势加剧了对该地区油价供应稳定性的担忧。
